title: ジャパンカップの後に・愛すべき好敵手

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
I... AM... VICTORIOUS! World, behold the future
Centurial Overlord's power!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Doto's heart is set—not to be my enemy... but a
mutual motivator. An eternal rival, it is!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Rivalry—something which a ruler requires—will
help me achieve the power to overthrow the
Golden Generation! With this settled, the stage is
ready.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
The Golden Generation awaits at the final
battleground... the Arima Kinen!
